title: hieracium subramosum subsp. kuusamoense
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. kuusamoense is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawk's beard, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium subramosum subsp. kuusamoense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
